title: cyathea eminens
intro: Cyathea eminens, also known as the giant tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The rhizome and roots of Cyathea eminens have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The rhizome and roots of Cyathea eminens are typically prepared as a decoction or tincture for use in herbal medicine.
